name: Can't Fail Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the marshmallows, evaporated milk, butter, sugar, and salt in a saucepan.
2. Cook and stir until the mixture comes to a full boil.
3. Boil for 5 minutes over medium heat, stirring constantly.
4. Remove from heat and add chocolate pieces, beating until melted.
5. Do not overbeat.
6. Fold in vanilla and chopped nuts.
7. Pour into a greased 9-inch square pan.
8. Chill until firm. Makes 2 1/2 pounds
